questions.hindi: यह काम कल पूरा किया जाएगा।
options: This information must be kept secret.
This notice should be read by every student.
This work will be completed tomorrow.
questions.answer: This work will be completed tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "यह काम कल पूरा किया जाएगा।" = "This work will be completed tomorrow."
Full sentence: "This problem can be solved."
